name: Performer's Hat
description: Notes Part of the Court Magician Sorcerer Set.
effects: On Taking Damage: 20% chance to spawn a decoy rabbit for five seconds. Cooldown: 15 seconds On Taking Damage: 20% chance to spawn a dove to aid you in combat for five seconds. Dove Combat: 200 damage every 0.5 seconds, within five tiles. Cooldown: 15 seconds
